title: loopguard PRD
description: Multi-story PRD consumed by loopguard.sh. Each story must be implementable in one Claude Code context window.

spec.description: One paragraph: what + why + observable change

acceptance_criteria.description: Programmatically checkable assertions. scripts/verify.sh exit 0 should always be one of them.

affected_files.description: Whitelist of files the builder may touch. Globs (*, ?) supported. Files outside this list trigger scope-violation revert.

max_diff_lines.description: Hard cap on (insertions + deletions). Exceeded → auto-revert.
